claim_text: SWE-ContextBench evaluates coding agents on task resolution, runtime, and monetary cost using test-based outcome checks on related tasks.
mechanism_text: The benchmark operationalizes evaluation by packaging each related task with a pre-fix base commit, problem statement, and ground-truth patches, then measuring issue resolution with FAIL_TO_PASS tests, regressions with PASS_TO_PASS tests, and separate runtime and cost metrics.
bounds: This explains how the benchmark measures performance, not that these measurements fully capture real-world coding utility.
